title: Planner Status Response DTO
description: 200 body for GET /api/v1/planner/status/{draft_id}: the {success, message, data} envelope wrapping the live planner status object. This is DISTINCT from planner_draft_schema.json (which models the draft itself). Missing/deleted drafts return 404 with ErrorEnvelopeDTO (per BE#659), NOT a 200 with a not_found status.

status.description: Planner status. Initial state is 'created' (canonicalized in BE#658).

generatedParts.description: Parts generated so far. camelCase, matching the backend response key.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC; present on created/error/cancelled transitions.
